basicInfo.name: Nightmare Jave
basicInfo.flavor: Once he came of age, Jave became the Ancient Dragon Knight and now rules over all of Dragon Ruins.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 40% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Furious Descent
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 115% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - Grants an additional 15% Damage Boost each time the number of targets is reduced by 1.
 - 100% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 115% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Draconic Fury
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 70% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Each attack grants an additional 8% Damage Boost each time the number of targets is reduced by 1.
 - Each attack has a 40% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 70% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Vengeful Armor
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Attack-Based Defense Boost. [Always Active]
 - 38% chance to do a Counterattack. [Always Active]
 - 3 Enemies When Counterattacking
 - Deals damage equal to 40% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 35% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

profile.story:
Jave was born possessing an unnatural power, which lead his parents to abandon him deep within Dragon Ruins as an infant.
The crying infant was discovered by Weiser, the Guardian Dragon. Weiser felt the two were fated to meet, and he took the child under his wing.
As Jave grew into a young man, he learned that he'd been abandoned by his human birth parents and began to resent all humans. Weiser tried to help Jave calm his emotions by entrusting him with a dragon egg.
With a newborn dragon to take care of, Jave gained a sense of responsibility, and this growth helped him when he was led to Rudy and Spike by the power of the Shards of Destruction within each of them.
The three young men had all faced various troubles in their lives due to their unique powers, and they quickly grew close as a result of their shared woes.
Unfortunately, this is most of the human interaction Jave gets. He is still very emotionally immature.
Unlike the other Seven Knights, who have a gravitas befitting of someone who rules over a territory, Jave is considerably more flippant and prone to acting on impulse, especially when bored.
He does guard his territory, Dragon Ruins, but mostly out of a sense of responsibility toward the dragons that reside within them.
The humans and monsters that live within his territory are largely none of his concern. Unless they happen to disturb the ruins, in which case a swift death awaits them.
